title: viola alba nothosubsp. bonaefidei
intro: Viola alba nothosubsp. bonaefidei is a subspecies of flowering plant in the viola genus, commonly known as the white viola or white pansy. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Viola alba nothosubsp. bonaefidei include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to reduce pain and inflammation. Herbal preparations of Viola alba nothosubsp. bonaefidei include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by drying the flowers and leaves of the plant.
